_doc: Stage 09 LLM extraction contract. Derived from extractCandidatesLLM(), invokeExtractionModel(), and the stage-09 parsing contracts on 2026-03-17.
entry_conditions: At least one routed LLM key is available for the run.
The source is extractable: not discovery-only, HTTP status < 400, and runtimeOverrides.disable_llm is false.
The source still has target fields not already satisfied by deterministic extraction or lock rules.
The budget guard does not block the call, and at least one scoped evidence snippet survives selection. Images are optional multimodal attachments.

field_contracts: field batches scoped by rules difficulty
evidence_context: evidence weights favor hint hits, lexical hits, and dimensional signals
response_mode: field name whitelist enforced after response

batching_limits.max_batches_per_product: config.llmMaxBatchesPerProduct (canonical runtime default 4; code fallback 7 when unset)
batching_limits.max_snippets_per_batch: config.llmExtractMaxSnippetsPerBatch (canonical runtime default 4; evidence selector fallback 6 when unset)

post_processing_rules: Drop candidates with missing or invalid evidence refs.
Normalize accepted rows as method=llm_extract with bound evidence refs.
Track llmSourcesUsed and llmCandidatesAccepted separately from deterministic rows.
failure_modes: Schema violation or malformed JSON increments retry/error telemetry.
Budget block skips the call and preserves unresolved fields for later phases.
Dangling snippet references are counted in phase08Extraction summary stats.
